visual_rule: Clean cyan-blue splash impact with glossy droplets, compact crown spray, and fading mist residue. Impact-only, no travel beam, no muddy surf.

variants.description: Shared battle splash package for water attacks.

assets.notes: Primary hit bloom and splash crown.
Glossy droplets and short spray streaks around the hit.
Soft concentric ripple residue for the final impact frame.
Low-alpha mist and fading droplets after the splash.

usage_notes: Use the impact bloom as the dominant layer.
Keep travel disabled for the shared fallback.
Prefer clean anchors and compact compositing.
